name: v1.0.0 — Stable Release
body:
## Opterius Commerce v1.0.0 — First Stable Release

Complete WHMCS replacement built with Laravel 13, PHP 8.3, MySQL, Blade + Tailwind CSS v4 + Alpine.js.

---

### What is Opterius Commerce?

A self-hosted billing and client management platform for hosting companies. Free with Opterius Panel, or standalone at $0/$9/$19/$39/mo depending on scale. Targets the same market as WHMCS.

---

### Phases Included in v1.0.0

#### Phase 1 — Foundation
Multi-currency billing, client management, product catalog, product groups, configurable options, promo codes, tax rules, order flow, invoicing, Stripe + manual payments, client credits, activity log.

#### Phase 2 — Client Portal
Full client-facing portal with dashboard, my services, my invoices, my orders, profile management. Admin impersonation (login-as-client). Two-mode auth (staff guard + client guard).

#### Phase 3 — Advanced Billing
Invoice numbering with yearly reset, invoice due dates, overdue detection, grace period suspension logic, invoice PDF, email delivery (invoice sent/overdue/paid notifications), client credit notes.

#### Phase 4 — Provisioning and Panel API
Queue-based hosting account provisioning via Opterius Panel API. HMAC-signed requests (X-Timestamp + X-Signature). Server groups with least-loaded auto-assignment. Provisioning log with request/response JSON. Manual provision actions from admin. Scheduled suspension (check-overdue-services) and termination (check-termination-services) commands.

#### Phase 5 — Support Tickets
Full help desk system. Ticket departments with per-department from-address. Ticket priorities and statuses. Internal staff notes (hidden from client). Canned responses with variable substitution. File attachments with configurable allowed types and max size. Ticket tags. Auto-close answered tickets via scheduled command. Admin ticket management: merge tickets, assign staff, change department. Client portal: open ticket, reply, close, re-open on reply.

#### Phase 6 — Domain Registration
Full domain registrar integration (ResellerClub / LogicBoxes HTTP JSON API). TLD catalog with per-TLD pricing. Domain availability search across all TLDs. Registration, renewal, transfer jobs with queue retries. Nameserver management, WHOIS privacy toggle, transfer lock/unlock, EPP code retrieval. Scheduled commands: generate renewal invoices 30 days before expiry, daily sync from registrar API. Admin TLD manager and Registrar settings tab. Client portal domain search, registration flow, and domain management.

---

### Architecture
- **Framework:** Laravel 13, PHP 8.3
- **Database:** MySQL (cents for all money, never DECIMAL)
- **Frontend:** Blade + Tailwind CSS v4 + Alpine.js
- **Auth:** Dual guards — `staff` (admin) and `client` (portal)
- **Queue:** Database driver, retryable jobs
- **Provisioning:** HMAC-signed Opterius Panel API
- **Registrar:** ResellerClub (LogicBoxes) HTTP JSON API
- **Payments:** Stripe + Manual payment recording

---

### Deployment
- Runs at `/opt/opterius` (not `/var/www`)
- Panel agent at `/opt/opterius-agent`
- Build CSS/JS locally, copy to server (never npm build on live)
- Sandbox registrar mode via Settings -> Registrar before going live
